item.title: About me
item.description: I’m passionate about mathematics and its applications to physics and computer science. I’ve recently finished my MSc Degree in Mathematics at Instituto Superior Técnico, University of Lisbon, under the supervision of John Huerta. Contact me at: email: rui at ruimp.com github: github.com/ruimp linkedin: linkedin.com/in/ruimpxt Research Interests derived geometry operads and higher strucutres factorization algebras homotopy Lie algebras supergeometry (shifted) Poisson geometry (topological) quantum field theory Education Master of Science in Applied Mathematics and Computation - IST, Lisbon - 2021 | 2023

item.title: On the job market
item.description: I’ve recently completed my Master of Science Degree in Mathematics at Instituto Superior Técnico, University of Lisbon. I’m happy to report that my thesis Vertex Superalgebras from Prefactorization Algebras earned the maximum possible grade of 20/20. I’ve begun applying for jobs and PhD positions! Feel free to reach out.

item.title: Welcome!
item.description: Welcome to my personal website! I’m interested in mathematics and its applications to physics and computer science. You can read more about me here or contact me at rmp at ruimp.com. I’m always happy to discuss anything math and science related.
